title: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advises as Hyundai and TVS join hands to develop electric 3-wheelers in India
description: Hyundai Motor Company and TVS Motor Company Ltd have signed a Joint Development Agreement to advance the development and commercialization of innovative Electric Three-Wheelers in India and related markets.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas acted on this joint development agreement between Hyundai & TVS.The transaction team was led by Bhargav Joshi (Partner), with assistance from Associates Saumya Sharma, Ayushi Agarwal, Arushi Kankariya, Harshitha Swarna, and Karan Anand, Associates.
